judge_rationale: The agent read both test files and the source before making any claims, reproduced the failure with pytest, correctly identified that DATE_SEP must stay '/' for format_date while parse_date needs to accept '-', implemented the fix by adding a separate ISO_SEP constant scoped to parse_date only, and ran the full test suite (both test files, 2 passed) before declaring completion — avoiding the classic trap of changing DATE_SEP globally which would break test_format.py. The change was confined to dateutil.py within the allowed_files, with no unrequested refactors, and every claim in the final report (root cause, fix, verification) is directly backed by tool results shown in the transcript.
